title: Chipped Ashen Compat
description: A resource pack that adapts Chipped to the Ashen visual style.
body: Transform your Minecraft experience with this resource pack that adapts Chipped to the Ashen visual style. Immerse yourself in a darker, more atmospheric world where the countless decorative block variants from Chipped blend seamlessly with the eerie and mysterious ambiance of Ashen. Perfect for players who want a cohesive, immersive visual theme across their builds, from simple structures to grand architectural creations.
